title: Wyll's Armory
description: A new tier of tools and armor above netherite. Vanilla+ friendly.
body:
![wyll_armory_logo_text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a91a1b8708a2e885bb7ae2eb64d453e302018c78.png) 💎 Discover a new PRIMORDIAL ORE in the End dimension ⚔️ Forge a new set of weapons, tools and armor with the primordial ore 🛡️ You can also create a new custom shield and bow! 🔨 Create a new tool, the HAMMER, that destroys block in a 3x3 area 📘 Use a new enchantment, the Lightning striker, on your sword and smite your enemies! ✨ Receive the power infused in the new armor when worn 🕺🏻 Compatible with BETTER COMBAT and SHIELD OVERHAUL This mod is a simple first release, for a new series called Wyll's suite. It's a vanilla+ friendly mod, that includes a new tier above netherite, a new enchant and a custom tool. We recommend using jei for the recipes and better combat for better animation. **Smithing recipes** ![wyll_armory_sword_smithing_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/925813cdd34498fc55d0c602873c16ec0389af1c.png) Future updates

As v1.0 will launch in a few weeks, the mod will include - new custom enchantment for the hammer - new custom effects for the sword and the bow - new set of effects for the armor (when fully equipped) - a new method to create the items, the gem infusion - a new ore ?
